fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number you entered in the Document No. field on the Options FastTab in the Project Post WIP to G/L batch job.

fields.name: G/L Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which the WIP, on this entry, is posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date you entered in the Posting Date field, on the Options FastTab, in the Project Post WIP to G/L batch job.

fields.name: WIP Entry Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the WIP amount that was posted in the general ledger for this entry.

fields.name: Job Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting group related to this entry.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the WIP type for this entry.

fields.name: G/L Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger balancing account number that WIP on this entry was posted to.

fields.name: WIP Method Used
fields.tooltip: Specifies the WIP method that was specified for the project when you ran the Project Calculate WIP batch job.

fields.name: WIP Posting Method Used
fields.tooltip: Specifies the WIP posting method used in the context of the general ledger. The information in this field comes from the setting you have specified on the project card.

fields.name: WIP Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date you entered in the Posting Date field, on the Options FastTab, in the Project Calculate WIP batch job.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Contains the description for the Job WIP G/L Entry. The description will be copied to the description for the related G/L Entry. The description includes whether it is a WIP, Recognition, or Completion posting, the Job No., and the Posting Date for the Job WIP G/L Entry.

fields.name: G/L Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the G/L Entry No. to which this entry is linked.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the entry has been reversed. If the check box is selected, the entry has been reversed from the G/L.

fields.name: Reverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the entry has been part of a reverse transaction (correction) made by the reverse function.

fields.name: WIP Transaction No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transaction number assigned to all the entries involved in the same transaction.

fields.name: Reverse Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reverse date. If the WIP on this entry is reversed, you can see the date of the reversal in the Reverse Date field.

fields.name: Job Complete
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a project is complete. This check box is selected if the Project WIP G/L Entry was created for a Project with a Completed status.

fields.name: Job WIP Total Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number from the associated project WIP total.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.
